card_name_verified: The Graphite Business Cash Unlimited Card from American Express
card_launch_note: Launched March 2026 per BusinessWire press release. New product line.
_review_reason: Card focuses on flat-rate cash back (2% unlimited + 5% Amex Travel). Has a CONDITIONAL milestone credit (up to $2,400 in Amex One AP fee credits after $250k spend) but this is not unconditional/recurring — excluded. No standard recurring annual credits like Uber/streaming/lounge.
